Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Umiushi Beef Bowls...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's too crowded right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The website said only[n]members can order takeout...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20901 0 0}Welcome! ...You want to order takeout?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, but that's only available for our members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But you can register to become a member online by using the code in our fan book.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please sign up if you'd like to! You can buy the fan book at the Net Café.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should come back after I sign up[n]as a member using the fan book...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20901 0 0}Welcome! ...Oh, I see you're a member![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have member-only dishes, so check them out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20901 0 0}Welcome! Sorry, we're full right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You could do takeout, but that service is only available to our members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But you can register to become a member online by using the code in our fan book.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please sign up if you'd like to! You can buy the fan book at the Net Café.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20901 0 0}Welcome! Sorry, we're full right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, I see you bought our fan book! But it looks like you haven't signed up to be a member yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you have a computer, you can go online and register using the code in your fan book.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You'll be able to order takeout if you become a member! Do consider it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I'll need to become[n]a member to order takeout...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should use the shared computer[n]in the dorm to register as one...[n]{f 1 1}
